itinerary.title: Arrival in Sydney and Harbour Cruise
itinerary.description: Arrive at Sydney Airport and transfer to your hotel. In the afternoon, enjoy a scenic Sydney Harbour Cruise to view the iconic Opera House and Harbour Bridge. Spend your evening exploring Darling Harbour, with options to dine at the waterfront restaurants.

itinerary.title: Sydney City Tour and Bondi Beach
itinerary.description: Enjoy a morning guided city tour. Take photo stops at the Sydney Opera House and walk through the Royal Botanic Gardens. Visit Mrs. Macquarie's Chair for city views, and explore the historic district of The Rocks. In the afternoon, visit the famous Bondi Beach for a coastal walk.

itinerary.title: Blue Mountains and Wildlife Park Excursion
itinerary.description: Take a full-day excursion to the Blue Mountains. Visit Scenic World to ride the Scenic Railway, Cableway, and Skyway. See the Three Sisters rock formation, and visit Featherdale Wildlife Park to see koalas and kangaroos. Stop by the mountain town of Leura before returning to Sydney.

itinerary.title: Flight to Gold Coast and Surfers Paradise
itinerary.description: Transfer to Sydney Airport for a short domestic flight to the Gold Coast. Check into your hotel and spend the afternoon at leisure. You can walk along Surfers Paradise beach or optionally visit the Q1 SkyPoint Observation Deck.

itinerary.title: Movie World or Sea World Experience
itinerary.description: Spend your day at Warner Bros. Movie World to enjoy movie-themed rides and superhero shows. Alternatively, visit Sea World to see marine wildlife and dolphin shows. Spend a relaxed evening back at Surfers Paradise.

itinerary.title: Flight to Melbourne and City Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Transfer to Gold Coast Airport for your domestic flight to Melbourne. Check into your hotel. In the afternoon, take a city tour visiting Federation Square, Flinders Street Station, the Royal Botanic Gardens, and the colorful bathing boxes of Brighton Beach.

itinerary.title: Great Ocean Road and Twelve Apostles Tour
itinerary.description: Embark on a full-day road trip along the famous Great Ocean Road. Enjoy the stunning coastal views, see the Twelve Apostles limestone stacks, walk down to Loch Ard Gorge, and visit the national park before returning to Melbourne.

itinerary.title: Phillip Island Penguin Parade or Free Day
itinerary.description: Spend a free day shopping at Queen Victoria Market or tasting wines in the Yarra Valley. Alternatively, take an optional afternoon tour to Phillip Island to watch the little penguins return to shore at sunset.

itinerary.title: Melbourne Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final breakfast at your hotel, check out, and take a private transfer to Melbourne Airport for your return flight home.

title: Australia Adventure
description: Explore the top sights of Sydney, the Gold Coast, and Melbourne on this 9-day Australian tour. Experience the Sydney Opera House, take a cable car ride in the Blue Mountains, visit theme parks on the Gold Coast, and drive along the Great Ocean Road.
highlights: Scenic Harbour Cruise and city sights in Sydney
Cable car rides in the Blue Mountains and wildlife encounters
Pass to Warner Bros. Movie World on the Gold Coast
Drive along the Great Ocean Road to see the Twelve Apostles
